title: The National Sports University Act, 2018
full_text: The National Sports University Act, 2018 राष्ट्रीय खेलकूद विश्वआविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2018 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: A2018-25 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 2018-08-17 Act Year: 2018 Short Title: The National Sports University Act, 2018 Hindi Title: राष्ट्रीय खेलकूद विश्वआविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2018 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a National Sports University in the State of Manipur, a specialised University first of its kind, to promote sports education in the areas of sports sciences, sports technology, sports management and sports coaching besides functioning as the national training centre for select sports disciplines by adopting best international practices and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports Department: Department of Sports Enforcement Date: 31-05-2018 Last Updated: 15-11-2018 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The National Sports University Act, 2018 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of University. Section 4. Objects of University. Section 5. Powers and functions of University. Section 6. University to be open to all caste, creed, race or class. Section 7. Central Government to review work and progress of University. Section 8. Officers of University. Section 9. Chancellor. Section 10. Vice-Chancellor. Section 11. Deans of Schools. Section 12. Registrar. Section 13. Finance Officer. Section 14. Controller of Examinations. Section 15. Librarian. Section 16. Other officers. Section 17. Authorities of University. Section 18. The Court. Section 19. Executive Council. Section 20. Academic and Activity Council. Section 21. Board of Sports Studies. Section 22. Finance Committee. Section 23. Other authorities of University. Section 24. Power to make Statutes. Section 25. Statutes, how to be made. Section 26. Power to make Ordinances. Section 27. Regulations. Section 28. Annual report. Section 29. Annual accounts. Section 30. Fund of University. Section 31. Returns and information. Section 32. Conditions of service of employees, etc. Section 33. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 34. Rights to appeals. Section 35. Provident and pension funds. Section 36. Disputes as to constitution of authorities and bodies. Section 37. Filing of casual vacancies. Section 38. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 39. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 40. Mode of proof of University record. Section 41. Power to remove difficulties. Section 42. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 43. Transitional provisions. Section 44. Repeal and savings. Schedule 1.
